name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == 
  /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
  /\ turn = 1

Next == 
  \E p \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[p] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
       /\ turn' = turn
    \/ /\ state[p] = "trying"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
       /\ turn' = turn
    \/ /\ state[p] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
       /\ turn' = turn + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
  /\ turn \in Int

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES coordinatorState, participantStates, messages

Prepare == 
  /\ coordinatorState = "prepare"
  /\ messages = [p \in 1..N |-> "Prepare"]

VoteYes == 
  /\ coordinatorState = "voteYes"
  /\ messages = [p \in 1..N |-> "VoteYes"]

VoteNo == 
  /\ coordinatorState = "voteNo"
  /\ messages = [p \in 1..N |-> "VoteNo"]

Commit == 
  /\ coordinatorState = "commit"
  /\ messages = [p \in 1..N |-> "Commit"]

Abort == 
  /\ coordinatorState = "abort"
  /\ messages = [p \in 1..N |-> "Abort"]

Init == 
  /\ coordinatorState = "prepare"
  /\ participantStates = [p \in 1..N |-> "unknown"]
  /\ messages = [p \in 1..N |-> "Prepare"]

Next == 
  /\ coordinatorState = "prepare"
      /\ \E p \in 1..N : participantStates[p] = "unknown" /\ messages[p] = "Prepare"
      /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
      /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p] = "VoteYes"]
      /\ coordinatorState' = "voteYes"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "prepare"
      /\ \E p \in 1..N : participantStates[p] = "unknown" /\ messages[p] = "Prepare"
      /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
      /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p] = "VoteNo"]
      /\ coordinatorState' = "voteNo"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "voteYes"
      /\ messages = [p \in 1..N |-> "VoteYes"]
      /\ messages' = [p \in 1..N |-> "Commit"]
      /\ coordinatorState' = "commit"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "voteNo"
      /\ messages = [p \in 1..N |-> "VoteNo"]
      /\ messages' = [p \in 1..N |-> "Abort"]
      /\ coordinatorState' = "abort"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState \in {"commit", "abort"}
      /\ messages = [p \in 1..N |-> IF coordinatorState = "commit" THEN "Commit" ELSE "Abort"]
      /\ messages' = [p \in 1..N |-> "Done"]
      /\ coordinatorState' = coordinatorState

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ coordinatorState \in {"prepare", "voteYes", "voteNo", "commit", "abort"}
  /\ \A p \in 1..N : participantStates[p] \in {"unknown", "yes", "no"}
  /\ \A p \in 1..N : messages[p] \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort", "Done"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES forkOwner, hasn, philosopherState


\* Philosopher states
States == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

\* Each philosopher is identified by an integer 0..N-1
Philosophers == 0 .. N-1

\* Each fork is identified by an integer 0..N-1
Forks == 0 .. N-1

\* Helper to get the left and right fork indices for a philosopher
LeftFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> p]
RightFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> (p + 1) \mod N]

\* State of each philosopher
\*  - "thinking": philosopher is thinking
\*  - "hungry": philosopher wants to eat but hasn't acquired forks yet
\*  - "eating": philosopher has acquired both forks and is eating
philosopherState == [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"]

\* Ownership of each fork
\*  - If fork f is owned by philosopher p, then forkOwner[f] = p
\*  - If fork f is free, then forkOwner[f] = -1
forkOwner == [f \in Forks |-> -1]

\* Helper to check if a philosopher can eat
CanEat(p) == philosopherState[p] = "hungry" /\ forkOwner[LeftFork[p]] = -1 /\ forkOwner[RightFork[p]] = -1

\* Action: philosopher p becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]

\* Action: philosopher p starts eating (acquires both forks)
StartEating(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"] /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = p, ![RightFork[p]] = p]

\* Action: philosopher p stops eating (releases both forks)
StopEating(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"] /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = -1, ![RightFork[p]] = -1]

\* Next-state relation
Next == \E p \in Philosophers :
          (philosopherState[p] = "thinking" /\ BecomeHungry(p)) \lor
          (philosopherState[p] = "hungry" /\ CanEat(p) /\ StartEating(p)) \lor
          (philosopherState[p] = "eating" /\ StopEating(p))

\* Initial state
Init == philosopherState = [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"] /\ forkOwner = [f \in Forks |-> -1]

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosopherState \in [Philosophers -> States]
          /\ forkOwner \in [Forks -> {p \in Philosophers} \cup {-1}]

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>>

\* Fairness constraints
SpecFair == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next)

\* Fairness constraints with weak fairness for philosophers becoming hungry
SpecFairWeak == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : BecomeHungry(p))

\* Fairness constraints with strong fairness for philosophers becoming hungry
SpecFairStrong == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : BecomeHungry(p))

\* Fairness constraints with weak fairness for philosophers starting to eat
SpecFairWeakStartEating == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StartEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with strong fairness for philosophers starting to eat
SpecFairStrongStartEating == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StartEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with weak fairness for philosophers stopping eating
SpecFairWeakStopEating == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StopEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with strong fairness for philosophers stopping eating
SpecFairStrongStopEating == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StopEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with weak fairness for philosophers becoming hungry and starting to eat
SpecFairWeakBoth == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : BecomeHungry(p)) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StartEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with strong fairness for philosophers becoming hungry and starting to eat
SpecFairStrongBoth == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : BecomeHungry(p)) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StartEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with weak fairness for philosophers becoming hungry and stopping eating
SpecFairWeakBothStopEating == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : BecomeHungry(p)) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StopEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with strong fairness for philosophers becoming hungry and stopping eating
SpecFairStrongBothStopEating == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : BecomeHungry(p)) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StopEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with weak fairness for philosophers starting to eat and stopping eating
SpecFairWeakBothStartStopEating == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StartEating(p)) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StopEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with strong fairness for philosophers starting to eat and stopping eating
SpecFairStrongBothStartStopEating == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StartEating(p)) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StopEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with weak fairness for philosophers becoming hungry, starting to eat, and stopping eating
SpecFairWeakAll == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : BecomeHungry(p)) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StartEating(p)) /\ WF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StopEating(p))

\* Fairness constraints with strong fairness for philosophers becoming hungry, starting to eat, and stopping eating
SpecFairStrongAll == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>> /\ WF_vars(Next) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : BecomeHungry(p)) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StartEating(p)) /\ SF_vars(\E p \in Philosophers : StopEating(p))

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(num) + 1]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num'[i] <= num'[j] \/ (num'[i] = num'[j] /\ i <= j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head>>

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ \A i \in 1..K: q[i] \in {0,1}
          /\ size = Cardinality({i \in 1..K: q[i] = 1})

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, candidate, hasn

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == 
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

(* A candidate requests votes from all other servers *)
RequestVote == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Candidate"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : currentTerm[i] = currentTerm[1] + 1
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : votedFor[i] = NULL
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Follower"

(* A follower grants a vote if it hasn't voted yet and the candidate's term is at least as large *)
GrantVote == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Follower"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : currentTerm[i] = currentTerm[1]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : votedFor[i] = NULL
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Candidate"

(* A candidate becomes a leader if it receives a majority of votes *)
BecomeLeader == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Candidate"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : currentTerm[i] = currentTerm[1]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : votedFor[i] = NULL
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Follower"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : currentTerm[i] = currentTerm[1] + 1
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : votedFor[i] = NULL
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "Leader"

Next == 
    \/ RequestVote
    \/ GrantVote
    \/ BecomeLeader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
    /\ readers = {}
    /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
    /\ \E r \in readers : 
        /\ r \in readers
        /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
    \/ \E r \notin readers : 
        /\ r \notin readers
        /\ readers' = readers \cup {r}
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
    \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
        /\ \A r \in readers : r \notin readers
        /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels, InitState, InitChannelState

VARIABLES state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived

vars == <<state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

Init == 
    /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> InitState[p]]
    /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> InitChannelState[c]]
    /\ markerSent = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

SendMarker(p, q) == 
    /\ channelState[(p, q)] = channelState[(p, q)] \cup { "marker" }
    /\ markerSent[p] = TRUE

ReceiveMarker(p, q) == 
    /\ channelState[(p, q)] = channelState[(p, q)] \setminus { "marker" }
    /\ markerReceived[(p, q)] = TRUE

RecordState(p) == 
    /\ state[p] = "recorded"
    /\ markerSent[p] = TRUE

Next == 
    /\ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "not recorded"
        /\ RecordState(p)
        /\ \A q \in 1..N : SendMarker(p, q)
    \/ \E (p, q) \in Channels :
        /\ channelState[(p, q)] \in {"marker", "non-marker"}
        /\ channelState[(p, q)] = "marker"
        /\ ReceiveMarker(p, q)
        /\ state[q] = "not recorded"
        /\ RecordState(q)
        /\ \A r \in 1..N : SendMarker(q, r)
    \/ \E (p, q) \in Channels :
        /\ channelState[(p, q)] \in {"marker", "non-marker"}
        /\ channelState[(p, q)] = "non-marker"
        /\ channelState[(p, q)] = channelState[(p, q)] \cup { "non-marker" }

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Messages

VARIABLES token, message

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ message = NULL

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED message

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, message>>

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ message \in Messages

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store, client, op, key, value, result

vars == <<store, client, op, key, value, result>>

Init == /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]
        /\ client = 0
        /\ op = 0
        /\ key = 0
        /\ value = 0
        /\ result = 0

Next == /\ client' = client + 1
        /\ op' = 0
        /\ key' = 0
        /\ value' = 0
        /\ result' = 0
        /\ \/ /\ op = 0
              /\ key \in Keys
              /\ op' = 1
              /\ key' = key
        /\ \/ /\ op = 1
              /\ key \in Keys
              /\ value \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![key] = value]
              /\ op' = 2
              /\ key' = key
              /\ value' = value
        /\ \/ /\ op = 2
              /\ key \in Keys
              /\ result' = store[key]
              /\ op' = 3
              /\ key' = key
        /\ \/ /\ op = 3
              /\ op' = 0
              /\ key' = 0
              /\ value' = 0
              /\ result' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]
          /\ client \in Nat
          /\ op \in 0..3
          /\ key \in Keys
          /\ value \in Values
          /\ result \in Values \cup {NULL}

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Int, value: V]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Int, value: V]]
  /\ chosen \in V

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
  /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == 
  /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
  /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot', value |-> proposers[p].value']

  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p) == 
  /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot', value |-> proposers[p].value']

  /\ chosen' = chosen

Chosen(v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = v

Next == 
  \E p \in 1..M : 
    \E v \in V : 
      /\ proposers[p].value = v
      /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
      /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
      /\ acceptors' = acceptors
      /\ chosen' = chosen
      \/ Prepare(p)
      \/ Accept(p)
  \/ \E v \in V : Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

THEOREM Spec => []TypeOK

THEOREM Spec => <> (chosen \in V)

THEOREM Spec => [] (chosen \in V => <> (chosen = chosen))

THEOREM

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, chunks, currentChunk, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks, state, timer

    /\ file \in Seq(0..255)
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

                        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

                        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ ackedChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> 0..MAX_RETRIES]
    /\ state \in {"Idle", "Sending", "WaitingAck", "Done"}
    /\ timer \in Nat
    /\ currentChunk \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)

Init == 
    /\ file = Seq(0..255)  \* Placeholder for actual file content
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

                        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

                        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0]
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ timer = 0
    /\ currentChunk = 1

SendChunk == 
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ currentChunk \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ state' = "Sending"
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {currentChunk}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![currentChunk] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks, timer>>

TransmitChunk == 
    /\ state = "Sending"
    /\ currentChunk \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ state' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer' = 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

ReceiveAck == 
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ currentChunk \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {currentChunk}
    /\ IF currentChunk < Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) THEN
           /\ currentChunk' = currentChunk + 1
           /\ state' = "Idle"

           /\ state' = "Done"
           /\ currentChunk' = currentChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, timer, retransmitCount>>

Retransmit == 
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer = 0
    /\ retransmitCount[currentChunk] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ state' = "Sending"
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![currentChunk] = retransmitCount[currentChunk] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, timer, currentChunk>>

Timeout == 
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer > 0
    /\ timer' = timer - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk>>

NoOp == 
    /\ state = "Done"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, timer, currentChunk>>

Next == 
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ TransmitChunk
    \/ ReceiveAck
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ Timeout
    \/ NoOp

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, state, timer, currentChunk>>

====
